---
id: exceptionevt
title: "Exceptionevt"
description: "This event captures details about exception events in the IOTC system, including metadata and component-specific errors. Note: this is currently not supported."
sidebar_label: "Exceptionevt"
hide_title: true

custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Exceptionevt"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/exceptionEVT"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This event captures details about exception events in the IOTC system, including metadata and component-specific errors. Note: this is currently not supported.

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"default":{"description":"exceptionEVT event payload","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"eventName":{"type":"string","example":"exception","description":"The name of the event indicating an exception occurred."},"timestamp":{"type":"string","example":"2019-08-24T14:15:22Z","description":"The ISO 8601 formatted timestamp of when the event occurred."},"eventNumber":{"type":"number","example":120,"description":"A unique numerical identifier for the event."},"upTime":{"type":"string","example":"5 days 4hr 3min","description":"The duration for which the system has been running since the last restart."},"details":{"type":"object","x-stoplight":{"id":"df25a86e1061a"},"title":"exceptions","properties":{"exceptions":{"anyOf":[{"description":"A collection of diagnostic, error, or warning events.","properties":{"radio":{"type":"object","description":"Represents diagnostic, error, or warning events related to the radio module.","properties":{"code":{"type":"number","example":51,"description":"A numeric code representing a specific radio-related issue or state."},"message":{"type":"string","example":"radio is not responsive","description":"A human-readable message describing the radio issue or state."}}},"scanner":{"type":"object","description":"Represents diagnostic, error, or warning events related to the scanner module.","properties":{"code":{"type":"number","example":0,"description":"A numeric code representing a specific scanner-related issue or state."},"message":{"type":"string","example":"scanner is connected and scanning in progress","description":"A human-readable message describing the scanner issue or state."}}},"system":{"type":"object","description":"Represents diagnostic, error, or warning events related to the system.","properties":{"code":{"type":"number","example":12,"description":"A numeric code representing a specific system-related issue or state."},"message":{"type":"string","example":"running out of memory","description":"A human-readable message describing the system issue or state."}}}}}],"type":"object"}},"description":"A reference to detailed information about the exceptions that occurred, categorized by components such as 'radio', 'scanner', and 'system'."}}},"examples":{"example1":{"value":{"eventName":"exception","timestamp":"2019-08-24T14:15:22Z","eventNumber":120,"upTime":"5 days 4hr 3min","details":{"exceptions":{"radio":{"code":51,"message":"radio is not responsive"},"scanner":{"code":0,"message":"scanner is connected and scanning in progress "},"system":{"code":12,"message":"running out of memory "}}}}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
